#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail

TASK_FILE="/app/tasks.txt"
mkdir -p "$(dirname "$TASK_FILE")"
touch "$TASK_FILE"

usage() {
  echo "Usage: $0 {add <task>|list|done <number>}" >&2
}

case "${1:-}" in
  add)
    shift
    if [[ $# -eq 0 ]]; then
      echo "Error: missing task" >&2
      usage
      exit 1
    fi
    printf '%s\n' "$*" >> "$TASK_FILE"
    ;;

    fi

      echo "Error: provide a positive task number" >&2
      usage
      exit 1
    fi
    num="$2"
    total=$(wc -l < "$TASK_FILE")
    if (( num > total )); then
      echo "Error: task number $num does not exist" >&2
      exit 1
    fi
    tmp=$(mktemp)
    sed "${num}d" "$TASK_FILE" > "$tmp"
    mv "$tmp" "$TASK_FILE"
    ;;

    exit 1
    ;;
esac
EOF

- Put files with no extension into `/uploads/other/`

#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail

UPLOAD_DIR="/uploads"

declare -A counts
extensions=()

# Process only regular files directly under /uploads.
shopt -s nullglob dotglob
for path in "$UPLOAD_DIR"/*; do
    [[ -f "$path" ]] || continue

    filename=${path##*/}

    # A file has an extension only if there is a dot that is not the first
    # character and there is at least one character after the final dot.
    if [[ "$filename" == *.* && "$filename" != .* && "${filename##*.}" != "" ]]; then
        ext=${filename##*.}
    else
        ext="other"
    fi

    dest_dir="$UPLOAD_DIR/$ext"
    mkdir -p "$dest_dir"
    mv -- "$path" "$dest_dir/"

    if [[ -z "${counts[$ext]+set}" ]]; then
        counts[$ext]=0
        extensions+=("$ext")
    fi
    counts[$ext]=$(( counts[$ext] + 1 ))

    printf 'moved: %s -> %s/\n' "$filename" "$ext"
done

for ext in "${extensions[@]}"; do
    printf '%s: %d files\n' "$ext" "${counts[$ext]}"
done
EOF

#!/bin/bash
set -euo pipefail

UPLOADS_DIR="/uploads"
declare -A counts

# Include hidden files; if no match, glob expands to nothing

for file in "$UPLOADS_DIR"/*; do
  # Only process regular files in /uploads (top-level)
  [[ -f "$file" ]] || continue

  name="$(basename "$file")"

  # Rules:

  # - Hidden files like ".bashrc" => other
  # - Hidden files like ".env.local" => local

  mkdir -p "$dest_dir"

  mv -- "$file" "$dest_dir/"
  ((counts["$ext"]++))

  echo "moved: $name -> $ext/"
